title: Add WebGL bar interaction example (click/hover with scale inversion)

in_scope: Visual hover feedback via fill color change in decorate callback
Click handler that displays clicked bar's index and value
HTML tooltip overlay positioned near hovered bar
Comment on d3fc/d3fc#1803 with explanation and CodePen link
out_of_scope: SVG overlay approach (separate example if ever needed)
acceptance_criteria: Hovering a bar highlights it with a distinct fill color
Tooltip shows bar index and value near cursor
Clicking a bar logs/displays its data
Mouse leave clears highlight and tooltip
Example follows d3fc conventions exactly (boilerplate, seedrandom, mockdate, screenshot test)
CodePen version works standalone with unpkg CDN imports
All 377 existing d3fc tests continue to pass
assumptions: Bars have uniform width (randomGeometricBrownianMotion with linear x scale)
xScale.invert() provides sufficient precision for bar identification
WebGL fill color can be set per-bar via decorate callback
d3fc example test harness works for new examples without modification

risks.risk: WebGL decorate/fill callback may not support per-bar coloring efficiently
risks.mitigation: webglFillColor utility exists and is used in other examples

risks.risk: Screenshot test may be flaky due to hover state
risks.mitigation: Screenshot captures default state without hover

risks.risk: Tooltip positioning may be tricky with d3fc-canvas custom element
risks.mitigation: Use absolute positioning relative to the container
